title: sabaoth #4519
definition:
1) "Lord of Sabaoth"
    1a) Lord of the armies of Israel, as those who are under the
        leadership and protection of Jehovah maintain his cause in war
nasbUsage:

    1a) Lord of the armies of Israel, as those who are under the
        leadership and protection of Jehovah maintain his cause in war

    NASB:  Sabaoth, i.e. armies:
